name: input-group-custom
visual_summary: An input group custom component is a form of input field that is often utilized in search bars and login screens. It is typically a collection of input fields combined with an icon or button that can initiate an action. This component can be utilized in a wide range of applications where users need to input information that requires an additional action.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-custom
Description: An input group custom component is a form of input field that is often utilized in search bars and login screens. It is typically a collection of input fields combined with an icon or button that can initiate an action. This component can be utilized in a wide range of applications where users need to input information that requires an additional action.
Style: minimal, modern
Interactions: clickable, responsive
Tags: input field, search bar, login screen, collection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
